---
name: ♿ Accessibility
about: Report accessibility barriers or WCAG compliance issues
title: "[A11y]: "
labels: a11y
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Accessibility Issue

A clear description of the accessibility barrier you encountered.

## WCAG Criterion

Which WCAG 2.2 criterion is affected? (e.g., 1.1.1 Non-text Content, 2.1.1 Keyboard)

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Navigate to '...'
2. Using '...' (keyboard / screen reader / other assistive technology)
3. Expected behavior: ...
4. Actual behavior: ...

## Assistive Technology

- **Screen Reader**: [e.g. NVDA, VoiceOver, JAWS]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 126, Firefox 128]
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15]

## Expected Behavior

What the accessible experience should be.

## Suggested Fix

If you have ideas on how to fix this, please describe them.

## Screenshots / Recordings

If applicable, add screenshots or recordings to illustrate the issue.
